The Craft

Metal, light,
and shadow.

Every IEROS light is precision laser-cut from steel, then powder-coated for permanent outdoor durability. The geometric pattern is the product — it doesn't just emit light, it sculpts it. The shadow cast on your wall is as much the design as the fixture itself.

Commission a piece

"Light is not just illumination — it is texture, shadow, and warmth."

IEROS · Outdoor

A light that creates patterns in darkness is not just a fixture — it's a permanent installation that changes every hour of every day.

— IEROS Studio

The Design

Geometric
precision.

The laser-cut lattice pattern is engineered so every opening casts deliberate light. At night the wall behind becomes a canvas. By day the fixture is an architectural object in itself.

  • Laser-cut structural steel body
  • Multi-layer powder coat, matte black
  • IP65 rated — rain, dust & frost proof
  • E27 socket · LED compatible
  • Available horizontal or vertical
Enquire Now

The Atmosphere

Every evening,
different.

Warm light through the lattice turns an ordinary wall into something worth looking at. The shadows shift as the sun angle changes, as seasons pass, as you move through the space. No two moments the same.

  • Warm 2700K or neutral 4000K LED recommended
  • Surface or recess mount options
  • Bespoke pattern variants available
  • Custom dimensions on request
